title: The Datilio File Workflow: Where AI Fits After Upload
summary: Datilio is built as upload → preview → filter → chart → Talk to Data—not AI first.

content.summary: Datilio is built as upload → preview → filter → chart → Talk to Data—not AI first.

body.text: Each step adds confidence before language models summarize anything. Upload CSV, Excel, or JSON. Preview schema and row count. Save filters for your business slice.

body.alt: Data visualization on a modern display
body.caption: Data visualization on a modern display. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload CSV, Excel, or JSON. Preview schema and row count. Save filters for your business slice. Chart key metrics.
Talk to Data then answers within that inspected context—same columns, same rules, same session.

items: Preview catches schema drift between exports.
Charts provide verification targets for AI totals.

body.text: Skipping preview or filters invites mismatches that look like AI failures but are scope errors.
The workflow is repeatable every Monday on fresh exports.
Datilio's integrated file workflow keeps AI as a verified layer—not a magic black box.

meta_description: Datilio is built as upload → preview → filter → chart → Talk to Data—not AI first.
